revision.text:
The Four '''Holy Sutras''' of Seicho-No-Ie by Masaharu Taniguchi (English translation)
==Source (front matter)== ;FOUR HOLY SUTRAS #PRAYERFUL SONG TO PRAISE AND BLESS THE HOLY MISSIONERS, #NECTAREAN SHOWER OF HOLY DOCTRINES, #SONG OF THE ANGEL, #FOR SPIRITUAL HEALING :MASAHARU TANIGUCHI, Ph.D. :SEICHO-NO-IE :United States :Missionary Headquarters :14527 South Vermont Avenue Gardena, California 90247 :FOUR HOLY SUTRAS :PRAYERFUL SONG TO PRAISE :AND BLESS THE HOLY MISSIONERS, NECTAREAN SHOWER OF HOLY DOCTRINES, SONG OF THE ANGEL, :FOR SPIRITUAL HEALING :Masaharu Taniguchi :Translator of HOLY SUTRAS PRAYERFUL SONG TO PRAISE AND BLESS THE HOLY MISSIONERS, NECTAREAN SHOWER OF HOLY DOCTRINES. SONG OF THE ANGEL: Religious Juridical Person, "Seicho-No-Ie" :Translator of HOLY SUTRA FOR SPIRITUAL HEALING: SEICHO-NO-IE, INC., Gardena, California :Publisher: SEICHO-NO-IE, INC., Gardena, California :Original Japanese Language Edition: :Shibukyo Seishimei Bosatsu Sange, Kanro no Hou, Tenshi no Koloba, Zokuzoku Kanro no Hou published by NIPPON KYOBUNSHA CO., LTD. Tokyo, Japan 1966
:ZAIDAN-HOJIN, SEICHO-NO-IE-SHAKAJIGYODAN 2008 :ISBN 978-0-9661797-4-3
==Invocation== ;O Parent God who gives life to all living beings, :Fill my whole being with Your Spirit and all blessings. :My life is not my own to claim. :It is the life of God who permeates the universe. :My acts are not my own to claim. :They are the acts of God who permeates the universe. :May the Lord of Seicho-No-Ie, who has appeared to teach us the Way of God, the Parent of heaven and earth, :Guide us and protect us.
==Prayerful Song to Praise and Bless the Holy Missioners== ;HOLY SUTRA :PRAYERFUL SONG TO PRAISE AND BLESS THE HOLY MISSIONERS :Almighty God — When You saw the suffering of humanity, You responded with a personification of Your Holy waves of salvation, appearing in divine forms and opening wide the gate of all-embracing love which You named Seicho-No-Ie. :Its purpose is to bring enlightenment to all living beings. :Whether man or celestial being, is there anyone who could not be enlightened through Seicho-No-Ie? Whatever religion or denomination, this gate of all-embracing love transcends them all, vanquishes sufferings, erases sins and leads humanity to divine purity. :There are those who strive to receive merit not only for themselves but come forward to provide guidance in the enlightenment of living beings by building temples, monasteries, training centers and the like. :There are also those who become Holy Mission Fellowship members whom have realized their holy mission as being chosen by God. :Members of the Holy Mission Fellowship aspire to the highest wisdom. :They have vowed to engage in the religious practice of leading all living beings to enlightenment even before they themselves are saved. :In other words they have truly advanced to the rank of a holy missioner and acquired the merit that becomes the foundation for manifesting the perfect freedom of their True Image. :When the perfect freedom of their True Image is manifested both the holy missioners and others will certainly attain enlightenment. :Such divine favor will benefit all sentient and non-sentient beings. :Although the evil deeds accumulated by family members may have become the karma that impairs enlightenment, once people realize their holy mission and become holy missioners, such merit will fill the universe, destroy those evil deeds and free their family from all karmic debts. :How much more then, will the holy missioners themselves be freed from their karmic debts. :Hereupon, realizing their holy mission they pledge to dedicate themselves in mind and body till the very end of their earthly lives to the enlightenment of all living beings, to offer their resources and to strive sincerely for the salvation of humanity. :The soul registers of the holy missioners are enshrined in the Vessel for Sacred Soul Enshrinement at the Seicho-No-Ie Main Temple and consecrated in God's presence. :In deep reverence for these holy missioners we read the Holy Sutra from afar to bless them. :The True Image of the holy missioners and their destiny is undoubtedly supreme awakening. :Although their mission in this earthly world may come to an end and their sacred souls leave this world, the holy missioners will eternally receive God's infinite and benevolent guidance, deepen their realization of Truth, and surely attain supreme awakening. :Physical dedication, spiritual devotion and the offering of resources are the highest, noblest, profoundest and most exquisite and wonderful of merits—a truth proven by Shakyamuni, Jesus and the many saints and holy men. :You are all truly children of God. :When children of God truly aspire to the highest wisdom and devote themselves to the practices of the holy missioners their indwelling God-nature will certainly be manifested. :Almighty God, bestow upon these holy missioners Your divine guidance, deepen their pure faith, enable them to demonstrate divine and wondrous effects, and may their merits permeate the whole universe.
:Note: The Prayerful Song to Praise and Bless the Holy Missioners is read before the Vessel for Sacred Soul Enshrinement in the Seicho-No-Ie Main Temple. Seicho-No-Ie members read this Holy Sutra during morning and evening worship, and, by mutually transmitting thoughts of Truth, contribute to one another’s supreme awakening as holy missioners.
:When reading this Holy Sutra in the Seicho-No-Ie Main Temple, the italicized portions should be omitted. :The Japanese calligraphy by Dr. Masaharu Taniguchi, reads KANRO NO HOU; English translation—Holy Sutra, Necta-rean Shower of Holy Doctrines.
==[[Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines]]== {{See also|Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines}}
===Divine Messages of the Lighter of the Seven Golden Candlesticks=== ;HOLY SUTRA :NECTAREAN SHOWER OF HOLY DOCTRINES :Divine Messages of the :LIGHTER OF THE SEVEN GOLDEN CANDLESTICKS :Be reconciled with the whole universe. When you are so reconciled the whole universe is your friend. When the whole universe is your friend nothing whatever can harm you. To be hurt by something or attacked by bacteria or an evil spirit is proof that you are not reconciled with everything in the universe. Therefore reflect upon yourself and be reconciled. :This was the meaning of my teaching long ago, first to be reconciled with your brothers before making offerings at the altar of God. The greatest among your brothers and sisters are your parents. Those who are grateful to God but cannot be grateful to their parents are against the Divine Will. To be reconciled with the whole universe means to be grateful to everything in the universe. True reconciliation cannot be achieved by patience or forbearance with one another. To be patient or forbearing is not :to be reconciled from the bottom of your heart. When you are grateful to one another, true reconciliation is achieved. Those who are grateful to God but cannot be grateful to everything in the universe are not reconciled with the whole universe. If you are not reconciled with the whole universe, although God wishes to save you, your thought waves of strife will hinder you from receiving God's waves of salvation. Be grateful to the blessings from your country. Be grateful to your parents. Be :grateful to your husband or wife. Be grateful to your children. Be grateful to those who serve you. Be grateful to all people. Be grateful to everything in the universe. Within those thoughts of gratitude you will find me and receive my salvation. Since I am All of everything, I am found only in reconciliation with the whole universe. You cannot see me here or there. I therefore cannot be contacted through a medium. Do not think that God will come if called on through a medium. If you :wish to call on me, first be reconciled with everything in the universe. Since I am Love, I shall appear when you have become reconciled with the whole universe. :(Message from the Spirit of the Lord on the night of September 27, 1931) :The time has come. Now all the sick can stand up. The time has already come when disease no longer exists for you. Two thousand years ago Christ cured a sick man who was far away :by these words alone: "...as thou hast believed, so be it done unto thee." The time has come for that Truth to be revealed to humanity. Look at the fact that sick persons who are far away are healed by merely reading the Seicho-No-Ie and knowing the Truth. Seicho-No-Ie now stands before humanity as the Seven Golden Candlesticks prophesied in the Revelation of St. John the Divine. Those who receive the Light of Truth from these Candlesticks will extinguish the three darknesses of sin, :sickness and death that have tormented mankind since the banishment from the Garden of Eden as described in Genesis. When Light comes all darkness vanishes. When Truth comes all delusion:vanishes. When delusion vanishes,:sin,:sickness:and :death, the products of delusion,:vanish.:Receive My :Light:without:doubt. I am :He who lights the Seven Golden Candlesticks of Truth. :(Message from the Spirit of the Lord on January 15, 1931)
===Holy Sutra=== ;Holy Sutra :NECTAREAN SHOWER OF HOLY DOCTRINES
====God==== ;GOD :One day the Angel came to Seicho-No-Ie and sang: :God the Creator :Is beyond the five senses, Even beyond the sixth sense, Holy, Supreme, Infinite, :Mind that penetrates the universe, :Life that permeates the universe, :Law that governs the universe, :Truth, Light, Wisdom, Absolute love— :These are the very nature of the Grand Life— :The Divine attributes of God, the Absolute. :When God appears There is goodness, There is justice, There is benevolence; Harmony comes of itself, All living things find their proper place :And there will be no strife, No preying upon one another, :No sickness, :No torment :And none will be in need. :God indeed is All of everything; :God is absolute and dwells in all things, :Nothing exists beyond Him. :God embraces the whole of Reality. :All that exists is solely His creation. :God, in creating all things, Uses no clay, :No wood, :No hammer, :And no chisel; :He uses neither tools nor materials whatsoever; :He creates solely with His Mind. :His Mind is the Creator of all things, :His Mind is the Substance that fdls the universe, :His Mind is indeed Almighty God, the Omnipresent. :When the Mind of this Almighty God, and perfect God, moves and becomes the Word, :All things of the True-Image :World unfold and come into being. :All things are the Idea of God, :All things are the Word of God, :Everything is Spirit, :Everything is the Divine Mind, :Nothing exists that is made of matter. :Matter is merely a shadow of the mind. :To see the shadow and regard it as Reality is delusion. :Do not be swayed by delusion. :Reality is eternal and can never be destroyed. :Delusion is momentary and will vanish at once. :Reality is freedom and without suffering, :Delusion is a state of bondage filled with suffering. :Reality is Truth, :Delusion is falsehood. :Reality transcends the five senses, :Is even beyond the sixth sense :And can never be perceived by the senses of men.
====Spirit==== ;SPIRIT :The senses perceive nothing but the shadow of beliefs. :Although you may possess spiritual eyes and see the figure of a spirit, :You have not seen Reality. :All that you can perceive through your senses are merely shadows of the mind and not the principal Reality. :Spirits differ in their appearance. :There are spirits who are ill, There are spirits who are suffering, :There are spirits who suffer :from a stomach disorder although they have no stomach, :There are spirits who suffer from a heart disease, yet they have no heart of their own— :These are all delusions. :When such spirits possess a man, :The possessed manifests either a stomach disorder or a heart disease. :Yet the various suffering spirits :That appear to the spiritual senses are not the principal Reality. :They are the shadows of :constantly changing delusions driven by mistaken beliefs. :The beliefs of the erroneous mind, constantly changing, may appear as a temporary form. :Yet, whatever the form that may appear, :A temporary form is eternally false and can never be Reality. :Do not fear what is unreal, :Do not treat as Reality what is unreal. :Confront what is unreal with Reality. :Dismiss what is not true with the true. :Oppose falsehood with the True Image. :Face darkness with light. :Only Reality can extinguish unreality. :Only the True Image can destroy falsehood. :Only Truth can breakdown untruth. :Only Light can prove the nothingness of darkness. :Teach them the True Image of life. :Teach them that the True Image of life is God Himself and perfect. :Teach them that since God is All in all, :Since He did not create sin :And since there is no Creator other than God, :In this world there is neither the committing of sin nor sin to be atoned for. :When all the spirits in the universe :And all living beings in the universe :Visualize this Truth, :Awaken to this Truth :And destroy all delusions of the mind which are the source of all sufferings, :All the angels of heaven will shower down a chorus of Truth :And all life in this world will turn toward the Light. :All delusions will vanish and this world will, as it is, turn into a brilliant paradise.
====Matter==== ;MATTER :Do not consider matter perceived through your senses as Reality. :Matter is not the substance of things, :Not life, Not Truth. Matter itself has neither intelligence :Nor sensations. :Matter is, after all, nothingness and has no properties :of its own. :It is but mind alone that gives properties to matter. :When your mind thinks of good health, health appears; :When your mind thinks of sickness, sickness appears. :Just as with a movie screen, When a wrestler is projected a wrestler appears, :When an invalid is projected an invalid appears. :Yet the film itself is transparent :With neither wrestler nor invalid of its own. :It is simply that the images produced by the photo :graphic chemicals cover the transparent film :And give rise to the figure of a wrestler or that of an invalid. :Yet both the healthy wrestler and the infirm invalid are shadows from the action of the photographic chemicals And they are not Reality. :If you run a transparent film through a movie projector and project it onto a screen, There will be neither a healthy wrestler, :Who will grow old before long and die, :Nor, of course, the frail invalid; :On the screen there will be light itself :And life itself, shining brilliantly. :Now you must know: :Your life is greater than that of the healthy wrestler. :However healthy the wrestler, :As long as he looks upon his physical body as Reality, :As long as he regards himself as no more than his physical body, :He is one who will perish and is without real health. :Real health is not in matter, not in the physical body; :Real life is not in matter, not :in the physical body; :The real you, your real self, is not in matter, not in the physical body. :Beyond matter, :Beyond the physical body :There is a wondrous perfect being. :This indeed is your perfect real self exactly as created by God, :Constantly healthy and eternally indestructible life. :Now is the time to transcend matter and awaken to the True Image of your life.
====Reality==== ;REALITY :The Angel continued: :Reality is eternal, Reality does not fall ill, Reality does not age, Reality does not die. :To know this truth is to know the Way. :Since Reality without want fdls the universe, it is called the Way; :The Way is with God, :God is indeed the Way and Reality. :Those who know and dwell in Reality will transcend destruction :And be in constant perfection and harmony. :Life knows living and does not know death. :Life is another name for Reality. :Reality has neither beginning nor ending, :Neither destruction nor death. :Hence life too has neither beginning nor ending, :Neither destruction nor death. :Life is above the measure of time :And also above the measure of age. :On the contrary, time is controlled by life. :Time is but a single moment when confined by life, :Time is infinite when released by life. :Therefore those who believe they are young will be restored to youth at once :And those who believe they have aged will instantly grow old and frail. :Space, too, never restricts life. :Rather, space is but a mode for perception created by life. :Life is primary and space is secondary. :The patterns of the ideas emanating from life and projected upon space :Are what we call matter. :Matter is essentially nothingness :With neither qualities nor power of its own. :The distortions that arise when life passes through the mode for perception :Present an appearance that in matter there are qualities or again the power to control life. :Do not be attached to distortions, :See the True Image of life correctly. :Those who know the True Image of life :Will transcend karma and gain the original undistorted, perfect freedom of life.
====Wisdom==== ;WISDOM :Wisdom in essence is the light of God, :Perfect and harmonious light, that accompanies Reality, :Infinite and omnipresent light that fills and illuminates all things. :Since man is a child of light :and always dwells in light, Man knows neither darkness Nor failure :Nor hindrance. :Like the celestial beings of heaven, :Like the fishes that swim through the seas, :Man moves about in a world of light, filled with light and exultation. :Wisdom is the light of enlightenment, :The Truth that illuminates and destroys delusion. :Truth alone is Reality. :Delusion, being merely unenlightened Truth, is like a bad dream. :Then take care to not see bad dreams. :When you awaken, this world becomes at once a radiant paradise :And you will manifest your True Image—brilliant and shining life. :God is infinite, omnipresent light of Wisdom, :Goodness without limitation, Life without limitation, The Substance of all things, Also the Creator of all things. :Therefore God is present everywhere. :God, being the omnipresent Substance and the Creator, Good is the only power, Good is the only life, Good is the only Reality. :Hence there is no power other than good, :There is no life other than good, :There is no Reality other than good. :Power that is not good— namely the power that brings misfortune—is, after all, only a bad dream. :Life that is not good— namely sickness—is, after all, only a bad dream. :All discord and all imperfections are in fact only bad dreams. :Our bad dreams give power to sickness, misfortune, discord and imperfection; :As when oppressed by evil in a bad dream, :When we awaken we find that no power had truly oppressed us :And that we had merely suffered from a dream of our own creation. :Indeed the power of evil, The power that oppresses our life, :The power that causes us to suffer, :Is not a power that truly exists in Reality. :It is merely our mind suffering from a dream of its own creation. :In the Way of the Buddha this is called delusion :Because the perfect and harmonious True Image of life has not been awakened to. :In the Way of God this is called sin :Because the perfect and harmonious True Image of life is concealed and not manifested.
====Delusion==== ;DELUSION :When the Angel sang thus at Seicho-No-Ie, :A cherub appeared and said: :"For the sake of mankind, for the sake of their spiritual enlightenment, pray reveal the true nature of delusion." :The Angel replied: :Delusion exists because we imagine that what is nonexistent exists. :Ignorance of the true state of things is called delusion. :Pleasure and pain are originally not in matter; :Believing they exist in matter, :We either pursue or flee from them— :Such erroneous thoughts are called delusion. :Life is essentially not in matter; :The false thought that there is life in matter is called delusion. :Essentially matter is in mind. Mind is the master of matter. :Despite the fact that mind is the creator of the qualities and shapes of matter, :We mistakenly believe that :mind is controlled by matter :And, according to the changes in matter, we worry and torment ourselves. :Not to awaken to the perfect and harmonious True Image of our life is called delusion. :Since delusion is the opposite of what is true, it is ignorance. :Since delusion is the opposite of Reality, it is unreality. :If delusion were real, :The sufferings born of delusion would be real. :But as delusion is the absence of Reality, :Those sufferings are only bad dreams from which we must awaken and are not real.
====Sin==== ;SIN :"Has sin real existence?" asked the cherub again. :The Angel's voice could be heard in reply: :All that is truly Reality is only God and the things that have come of Him. :God is perfect :And all that God has created is also perfect. :I ask you then, :Do you consider sin to be perfect? :The cherub replied: :"Lord, sin is not perfect." :The Angel continued: :Sin is imperfect and therefore not real; :Sickness is imperfect and therefore not real; :Death is imperfect and therefore not real; :Do not take for Reality what is not God's creation. :Do not fear what is unreal, imagined in a bad dream. :Sin, sickness and death are not God's creations. :Therefore, although they appear to wear the mask of Reality, :They are nonexistent and false. :I have come to remove this mask and prove that sin, sickness and death are nonexistent. :Shakyamuni Buddha also came for this purpose. :Jesus Christ also came for this purpose. :If sin were real, :All the Buddhas could not erase sin :Nor could the crucifixion of Jesus Christ erase sin. :How blessed are you that sin is nonexistent and a shadow of delusion. :Hence the Buddhas have embraced all living beings and erased their sins. :Jesus Christ, too, merely by saying the words "Thy sins are forgiven" erased sin. :I, too, have had the Songs of Seicho-No-Ie put into words :And by the power of the word have exposed the :true nature of sin, Returning it to its original nothingness. :Those who read my words will know the true aspect of Reality :And erase all their sins. :Those who read my words, will know the true aspect of life, :Vanquish all illnesses, Transcend death and live eternally.
====Man==== ;MAN :I am Truth, :The Angel from Truth, :The Light that shines brilliantly from Truth, :The Light that illuminates and destroys delusion. :I am the Way, :Those who live by my Words will not err from the Way. :I am Life, :Those who draw from me will neither fall ill nor die. :I am Salvation, :Those who trust in me will all be taken in and dwell in the True-Image Realm. :When the Angel had thus recited, :The cherub asked again: :"Lord, explain the true nature of man." :The Angel replied: :Man is not matter, :He is not a physical body. :He consists of neither brain cells nor nerve cells, :He is neither blood cells nor blood serum nor muscle cells; :Nor is he the composite of them all. :You must awaken to the True Image of man. :Man is spirit, :Man is life, :Man is immortality. :God is the radiant source of man :And man is light emanating from God. :Without light there is no radiant source, :Without a radiant source there is no light. :Just as light and its radiant source are inseparable, :God and man are one. :God is Spirit, :Therefore man is also Spirit. :God is Love, :Therefore man is also Love. :God is Wisdom, :Therefore man is also Wisdom. :Spirit is not material in nature, :Love is not material in nature, :Wisdom is not material in nature, :Therefore, :Man, who is spirit, love and wisdom :Has nothing to do with matter. :The real man, :Being spirit, :Being love, :Being wisdom :And being life, :Cannot commit a sin, :Cannot become ill :And cannot die. :Sin, sickness and death are merely your own bad dreams. :Awaken to the True Image of life. :Awaken to your True Image which is the real man. :Real man is God-man, The image of God Himself. :He who perishes is not the real man. :He who commits sin is not the real man. :He who becomes ill is not the real man. :Mankind, I say to you: :Awaken to your own true nature. :You yourselves are the real man and never anything else. :Therefore, when seen from Truth :Man cannot commit sin, cannot fall ill and cannot die. :Who could dare say, 'You sinners, sinners"? :Since God did not create sinners, :There is not a single sinner in this world. :Sin is contrary to the child of God's true nature. :Sickness is contrary to the true nature of life itself, :Death is contrary to the true nature of life itself. :Sin, sickness and death are merely nonexistent shadows of delusion, imagined in a bad dream. :In the True-Image World :God and man are one; :God is the radiant source, :Man is the light emanated from God. :The illusion that has led mankind to see the bad dream :That sin, sickness and death are real :Is rooted in the ancient theology that man is made from dust. :More recently it is founded on modern science's claim that man is made of matter. :These are the first dream which led mankind to the illusion of sin, sickness and death. :When the first dream is destroyed, :The fundamental cause of sin, sickness and death is destroyed :And they return to their original nothingness. :You recover from illnesses by reading the Seicho-No-Ie and knowing the Truth :Because your first dream is destroyed. :When there is no first dream, There will be no dreams to follow. :When there are no dreams at all, as man is originally undefiled, :He cannot commit a sin even if he so desires. :When there are no dreams at all, as man is originally free from illness, :He cannot fall ill even if he so desires. :When there are no dreams at all, as man is originally infinite life, he will never die. :Therefore, all people of the world :Seek with the utmost care your Spiritual essence, :Do not seek this Spiritual essence in matter and in the physical body :which are the products of dreams and illusory thoughts. :Christ said: :"The kingdom of God is within you." :Truly, I say to you: :"Within you" means your true nature, the real man. :Since your true nature is God-man, the kingdom of God is only "within you." :He who seeks the kingdom of God without pursues a dream; :He will never find the kingdom of God. :He who seeks the kingdom :of God in matter also pursues a dream; :He can never build the kingdom of God upon this earth. :Christ also said: :"My kingdom is not of this world." :The kingdom of this world is merely a shadow. :The realm of eternal happiness is within you alone. :Only when you have awakened to the realm of eternal happiness within :Can the realm of eternal happiness be manifest without as a reflection. :Only when you have awak :ened to the life of infinite health within :Can infinite health be manifest without as a reflection. :Man's five senses can perceive no more than a world of reflection. :If you wish to purify the world of reflection, you must purify the original mental plates :By removing the dusts of delusion. :I have indeed seen the emptiness of the world of matter. :I have seen that the world of matter is nothing but a shadow. :I have seen too that man is light radiated from God. :I have seen that the physical body is but a shadow of the mind. :Matter is but a changing shadow :Resembling the ever-shifting shadows on a revolving lantern. :Therefore do not mistake the shadows that you see for Reality. :Man's real nature is Godman, :Eternal, indestructible, immortal Spirit and not a machine made from matter, :Nor did matter first exist and then the Spirit reside within it. :Such dualism is entirely false. :Just as a silkworm does not live in a cocoon which first exists, :But spins its thread to form its cocoon and then dwells within it, :Matter is a shadow of the Spirit and a product of the mind. :Man's real nature is above all life that is Spirit, :Spinning his mind-threads he forms his body-cocoon and then he resides within it :And in this way the Spirit becomes the physical body. :Realize well that the cocoon is not the silkworm. :If this is so, likewise the physical body is not man :But merely his cocoon. :Just as when the time comes the silkworm breaks out from its cocoon and flies away :Man, too, when his time has come leaves his bodycocoon and ascends to the spiritual world. :Never assume the death of the physical body to be the death of man. :Man is Life :And therefore he will never know death. :In accordance with the state of his mind, the time and his needs, :Various conditions may appear in his physical body and circumstances. :Yet life itself cannot fall ill, Life itself cannot die. :By changing your mind :You may freely change your health and circumstances. :Yet the time will finally come when life no longer needs its physical bodycocoon. :Life shall leave its physical body-cocoon :And soar on to an even freer realm. :Do not mistake this for the death of man. :The essence of man is Life, There can never be death for him. :When the Angel had thus sang, :Exquisite and delicate heavenly music could be heard in the sky, :Flower petals showered from where we knew not, :As if in praise of the Truth taught by the Angel. :(End of the Holy Sutra) :May the merits of this Holy Sutra extend to all beings, And may we, together with all living beings, awaken to and fulfill our True Image.
:The Japanese calligraphy by Dr. Masaharu Taniguchi, reads TENSHI NO KOTOBA; English translation — Holy Sutra, Song of the Angel.
==Song of the Angel== ===Divine Messages of Eternal Life=== ;Holy Sutra ;Song of the Angel ;Divine Messages of Eternal Life
:My advent is not for the sake of matter ::but for the sake of life, :not for the sake of the flesh ::but for the spirit. :There are few ::who have awakened to this.
:For those attached ::to the appearance and disappearance of matter, :when matter is increased ::their faith is raised :and when matter is decreased ::they lose their faith.
:When their bodies become healthy ::they praise God :and when someone in their family falls ill ::they lose their faith. :Such people have no faith in God ::but only in matter.
:Since matter is something that changes, ::faith built on Divine favor :will come to grief through changes in matter.
:God reveals the healing of sickness to demonstrate ::that the physical body may be changed in any way by the mind :and to awaken men to the truth ::that the body is a shadow of the mind.
:The body, which is a shadow of the mind, ::is not the physical body alone; :both the astral body and the spiritual body ::are entirely shadows of the mind. :The statement "Death does not exist" ::does not refer to the physical body. :In actual fact the cells of the physical body ::are perishing moment by moment and are constantly changing. :That which is forever living is Life alone, ::which effects this change. :Life alone is I ::and Life alone is you. :There is no other I or you.
:This Life is called Spirit ::which is perfect and harmonious. :Yet perfection and harmony ::do not refer to form. :God essentially has no form, ::yet He is harmonious, complete and perfectly free. :Since God is perfectly free, He may appear in many divine forms ::or again as an angel or cherub. :In whichever form God appears, ::these are His personifications and not false. :Nevertheless, to be attached to one form and to believe that it alone is I ::is to be ignorant of the truth concerning God. :It is to be unaware ::of My total aspect. :Strive to know what is true.
:You are also children of God ::and therefore the same as Me. :Your physical body is one appearance of you ::and not your total aspect.
:(Message from the Spirit of the Lord on April 10, 1932)
:Your physical body is a musical composition performed on the strings of thought. :The concept that Life dwells in the physical body is a dualistic one and not the truth. :Properly speaking, Life manifests the physical body in accordance with the composition performed on the strings of thought. :The physical body, the double body, the astral body and the spiritual body are no more than reflections of thought. :Depending upon the type of your thought's musical score, you may manifest either a physical body, or a double body or an astral body or a spiritual body. :All people must someday lose their physical body, but they do not die. :Man is a child of God and therefore deathless. :The form of your temporary existence will change according to your thought's musical score. :The temporary existence of all people will differ according to the differences in their thought. :When a major change occurs in the form of your thought your temporary existence will manifest itself in another world and your physical body—the manifestation of your thoughts until now-will quickly disintegrate. :People call this "death," but it is not death. :It is as if Life has finished the performance of one musical composition on the strings of thought and turned to another. :No major break in the form of the musical composition of thought performed by Life but only a lack of harmony in the tones of the thought strings is called sickness. :Thus sickness will be healed when the dissonance of the thought strings' tones are corrected. :But, no matter how the thought strings' tones may be corrected, the initial piece of music will surely come to an end and the performer must study still higher forms of musical composition. :What I mean is that your life on earth must come to an end. :Your life on earth is your initial piece. :Those who have rapidly finished their initial piece have rapidly completed the beginner's school. :Do not be sad when completing your piece of music, you will thereby advance to still higher musical compositions. :Before that, a tuner will come to adjust the tones of your thought strings. :Because of this tuning your physical body will play a dissonant tune. :Before concluding this world's piece of music your physical body may appear to be in disharmony because of this tuning. :Yet your body is not truly in disharmony. :Thus you will gradually advance to ever higher musical compositions. :A musical composition may end, but the performer does not come to an end. :The performer is a child of God and deathless!
:(Message from the Spirit of the Lord on June 26, 1931)
:Note: The "Song of Eternal Life" and the "Divine Messages of Eternal Life" help one to understand that the physical body is unreal and that eternal life alone is Reality. Therefore both are suitable for reading at funerals and ancestor memorial services.
===Holy Sutra: Song of the Angel=== ;Holy Sutra ;Song of the Angel
:Again the Angel sang: :As His words resounded through the heavens and created a rainbow of five colors :His words spread over the earth and became a divine symphony. :In harmony with this symphony cherubs danced in the sky :Holding branches in full bloom :And wearing delicate and exquisite robes; :Flower petals showered gloriously down to earth :And the earth became a wondrous heavenly garden.
:Then the Angel sang: :I am the revealer of the perfect God. :What God has granted me :I shall also grant you. :What God has revealed to me :I shall also reveal to you. :I am sent by the Creator, :I am the Word of the Creator, :I am the Vibration of the Creator. :I have come from the Creator and shall illuminate you through words. :I am the Light of the Creator.
:Where my Light shines :There will be no darkness, :No sickness, :No aging, :No death.
:Those who believe will gain infinite life and shine eternally. :I am the Word of the Creator. :My words do not come from me, :God is together with me :And in my words I, too, hear His voice. :I am the trumpet.
:I say to you— :Do not worship me alone. :Do not praise manifestations of God in form. :Every good that dwells in me comes from the universal God. :Worship God, whom I reveal to you. :I do not say that you must worship me, :I am only His messenger. :I have seen that my own true nature is God :And I shall awaken you to :your true nature which is God.
:The truth that you must first awaken to is that your real self is God.
:Know that every one of the countless souls are also reflections of the one Spirit of God :In the same way that a single object reflected by a million mirrors appears in a million forms.
:Although your souls are separate and appear to be different, :You are all one and reflections of the one Spirit of God.
:Therefore you are all brothers and sisters in God.
:Know that all lives are brothers, :Know that all lives are sisters, :Know that the lives of all are inseparably one.
:When you know that God is the Father of all lives, :A feeling of love and praise will naturally arise within you.
:Therefore, do not be swayed by the appearance of your physical bodies. :Do not discriminate between your brothers because of appearances. :The physical body is no more than the shadow of one's beliefs. :How could infinite life ever dwell in a body which must age and decay?
:When the Angel had thus spoken :The cherubs ended their dance and turned toward the Angel and bowed. :Then from among them :A very wise cherub who was wrapped in a thin green robe stepped forward.
:He asked the Angel: :"But, Elder of Life, the scientists of modern times say that we think with our brains and feel things through our nerve cells. :Without our brains or our nerve cells how can we think and feel things?"
:The Angel replied: :To think that there is either pleasure, pain or sensation :Within this matter called the cells of the physical body is delusion. :Since the physical body is essentially nonexistent :And since it is merely a reflection of ideas, :When we forget our physical body and are in a state of selflessness, :Our body will function most perfectly.
:Behind the physical body is the mind that rotates the film of ideas, :The physical body is no more than a figure projected onto the screen of this world. :Awaken from the dream that you are a physical body!
:Even the superior scientists :Do not consider man to be a physical body :And they have shown that the sensations are the :impressions of the mind that lies behind the body.
:Have you not read the account of a certain neurotic patient who was treated by the great Italian physician Lombroso? :The patient suffered a transfer of the senses and could not see with his eyes :But could see with the tips of his fingers. :There are no eyes in the fingertips, no retinas and no optic nerves; :Yet he was able to see quite well with his fingertips. :This proves that the sensations :Are neither in the body nor in the nerve cells but exist in the mind.
:Once you accept the fact that you see with your mind :You could also see with your fingertips, :And even without your fingertips you could see and hear. :This is so called clairvoyance and clairaudience.
:Beethoven, the great composer, wrote many of his famous pieces in the twilight years of his life when he was almost totally deaf. :Although deaf, his mind's ear was open :And by playing the piano keyboard he could hear the heavenly sounds of his music.
:In the same way, if man were not attached to his physical body, :It is a fact and not just a theory that he could see without eyes, :He could hear without ears :And touch objects without his body.
:Then, the cherub asked again: :"Lord, although we have heard that we can both see and hear without eyes :or ears, yet is it possible to touch things without a body?"
:The Angel replied: :Have you not read about recent experiments in psychic science? :The subject was tightly bound to a chair and was not in the least able to move his body. :Yet through the power of his mind, :He made a desk float in the air, :Caused an accordion to fly up, a voice to speak from a :megaphone floating in the air :Or an accordion floating in the air to play.
:These are examples of touching things or causing objects to move without a body. :The mind can move objects because objects are the impression of the mind and not totally different.
:For instance, when an artist paints a masterpiece :The masterpiece is no more than the impression of the artist's mind and is not the artist himself. :In the same way man's body :is also the impression of his mind and not the man himself.
:According to man's mind, the appearance of his physical body may change to become beautiful or ugly And his health may also change. :When a man awakens to this principle he can control and change his body at will.
:Delusion says: "Man is his physical body," :Yet man is not his body. :The True Image of man is a child of God and, being eternal life, :Man cannot be represented by a physical body that is constantly changing. :Everything that constantly changes is not the fundamental nature :But merely a shadow of beliefs. :If beliefs change, appearances will also change. :Matter is not the True Image of an object, :Matter merely appears and disappears in accordance with the mind. :Since matter is a shadow of the mind, :In essence it has neither consciousness nor sensation, :It does not feel pain nor suffer from sickness. :Nevertheless, the physical body feels pain which matter cannot possibly feel :Merely because of the thought that "the physical body feels." :If you hypnotize a person and temporarily remove his thought, :He will feel no pain if pierced by a needle or cut by a scalpel. :Then painless injections and surgery could freely be performed, could they not?
:A body from which all thought has departed is called a corpse. :Have you ever seen a corpse that could feel pain? :Since thought has left the corpse, it feels no pain. :A system that appears in accordance with thought is the living physical body. :Therefore the living physical body changes in accordance with thought.
:Think good health, and the body becomes healthy; :Think sickness, and the body falls ill. :Therefore always think "good health" :And do not think "sickness."
:If thought leaves the physical body, :The living physical body changes into a dead body :And with the departure of the power of thought, which has maintained the living body, :The dead body decomposes and returns to the elements of the universe. :Thought that has left the physical body will maintain its individuality through the power of thought :And will continue to live in the astral world.
:This is your so called soul, :And in accordance with the purification of your mind, :Your soul will enter an appropriate higher spiritual world.
:Those souls whose minds are not purified :Will temporarily create through the power of thought an appropriate environment and suffer there. :Therefore always keep your mind pure and high.
:Do not ever think of evil. :Do not ever think of impurity. :Moreover, do not ever think of suffering :Nor ever think of sickness. :Evil, impurity, suffering and sickness are not God's creation :And are nothing but the illusions created by your delusive thoughts.
:When you see darkness :Do not believe it to be real. :Darkness is nothing but the absence of light.
:Evil, impurity, suffering and sickness merely indicate the absence of God's creation. :What God did not create is nonexistent. :The absence of Reality is called evil, impurity, suffering and sickness. :Therefore, why do you fear :nonexistent suffering? :Why do you fear nonexistent sickness?
:If you are frightened in the dark, :Even dry pampas grass can appear to be a ghost. :In the same way if you fear sickness in mental darkness, :Even nonexistent sickness will appear to be real. :Yet sickness is not real, :It is nothing but a shadow of fear. :When the darkness of your mind is exposed to light and your fear vanishes, :Sickness will disappear of its own and return to nothingness.
:Therefore, always picture in your mind the harmonious, perfect and immaculate image of Reality. :Always picture the harmonious, perfect and healthy image of the child of God. :Man is a child of God and cannot be anything else.
:From harmonious and perfect God comes no misfortune, :From harmonious and perfect God comes no sickness, :Misfortune and sickness are nothing but the delusions of the five senses.
:Do not fear sickness. :The sickness imagined by your five senses :Can never bring suffering to the True Image of your life, :Can never harm the True Image of your life.
:No matter what sickness or misfortune, :Like clouds, they merely conceal the face of the True Image of life and are no more than illusions. :Those illusions are the products of delusion, which arises from ignorance of the True Image of life. :When you know the True Image of life and destroy delusion, fear will be destroyed. :When fear is destroyed, :All misfortune and sickness will vanish of their own accord.
:When the Angel had thus sang, :A utopia, like the Isle of Eternal Youth, appeared in the sky. :At the summit of the isle was a palace of crystal :Whose roof and pillars were of crystal.
:When the Angel sat in the seat of honor :The cherubs descended from heaven through the crystal roof and formed a circle around the Angel. :Then from where we knew not could be heard the flourish of heavenly music :And when the cherubs with their robes aflow danced in harmony with the music :In the surrounding deep blue sea :Crescent-shaped boats :Like the gondolas of Venice glided quietly by and all was peaceful. :Then from the palace of crystal the Angel's voice resounded in the sky.
:Pointing to the earth, the Angel said: :"See here is the True-Image World, the Reality. :The True-Image World is your Father's Kingdom, Heaven, :The Pure Land. :In your Father's Kingdom there are many dwellings. :The dwellings in the True-Image World are all Seicho-No-Ie. :Therefore, for the inhabitants there is no hunger, :No sorrow, :No conflict, :No sickness.
:All things appear as desired :And vanish when they have fulfilled their purpose.
:A harmonious, perfect, pure and exquisite world— :This is the True-Image World. :This is your world. :There is no other world."
:When the Angel had thus sang, In the direction in which the Angel pointed :A countless number of Seicho-No-Ie dwellings lined the streets; :Wisps of smoke from their hearths, like the mists of spring, trailed over them. :All the inhabitants were perfectly happy and contented :And there stood a world of eternal happiness.
:(End of the Holy Sutra)
:May the merits of this Holy Sutra extend to all beings, And may we, together with all living beings, awaken to and fulfill our True Image.
===Song of Eternal Life=== ;Song of Eternal Life
:This body is like a rainbow; :A rainbow cannot remain for long, :In a moment it fades away.
:This body is like a water bubble; :A water bubble cannot remain for long, :In a moment it bursts.
:This body is like a mirage; :A mirage cannot remain for long, :In a moment it disappears.
:This body is like an echo; :An echo cannot remain for long, :In a moment it is gone.
:This body is like a flash of lightning; :A flash of lightning cannot remain for long, :In a moment it vanishes.
:This body is like a floating cloud; :A floating cloud cannot remain for long, :In a moment it fades away.
:This body is like a stream of water; :A stream of water cannot remain for long, :It continually flows away.
:This body is like the trunk of a plantain; :Although it seems to have a core, :It has none, it is hollow.
:This body is like a flame; :Although it seems to be warm, :Burning to nothing, it is empty.
:This body is like a dream; :Although it seems to be real, :Being false, it is empty.
:This body is born from delusion; :Although it seems to be real, :Being inconstant, it is empty.
:This body is ownerless; :Although it seems to have an owner, :It has none, it is empty.
:This body has no mind; :Although it seems to have a mind, :Being like rubble, it has no mind.
:This body has no life; :Like a leaf that flutters about in a whirlwind :It merely changes by the strength of karma.
:This body is impure; :Although it seems to be beautiful, :It is not so.
:This body is transient; :Although it seems to be firm, :The time must come for it to die.
:Like a water bubble, like a rainbow, :Like a mirage, like an echo, :Passing things are not Reality.
:Now, never say :That this body is your real self, :That such unreality is your real self.
:That which is empty is not your real self. :That which must die is not your real self. :That which is transient is not your real self.
:Verily, the Dharma-body is your real self. :Verily, the Buddha-body is your real self. :Verily, the Diamond-body is your real self.
:Verily, that which is indestructible is your real self. :Verily, that which is deathless is your real self. :Verily, that which fills the whole universe is your real self.
:The Japanese calligraphy by Dr. Masaharu Taniguchi, reads ZOKUZOKU KANRO NO HOU; English translation — Holy Sutra, For Spiritual Healing.
==For Spiritual Healing== ===Divine Messages of Repentance=== ;Holy Sutra for Spiritual Healing ;Divine Messages of Repentance
:If there is anyone among you who is ailing, come to one of the leaders of my teaching, and ask him to pray for you and teach you the Shinsokan (Meditation to Visualize God). Since the leaders of my teaching have received my word, their words will heal you. Reflect upon yourself, and if you feel that you have sinned, confess without reservation to one of my leaders. My teaching explains the nothingness of sin. But it is wrong to think that, since sin essentially does not exist, confession is not necessary. Because sin is primarily darkness, it destroys itself when exposed to light, but when sin is covered up and not exposed to light, darkness remains darkness and will not vanish. The price of sin is death. When sin is covered up and not brought to light, the result is death.
:People of the world, do not cover up and conceal evil in the dark. You cover up and hide evil because you are attached to evil. You fear exposure of sin because you are attached to that sin. Do not become haughty upon hearing my teaching that "essentially sin does not exist." Why should those who know the Truth of the nonexistence of sin be afraid of the disclosure of sin and try to cover it up? Do not deceive yourself by thinking, "This is all right because basically there is no sin." To deceive yourself is the first sin. This is because you are covering up and concealing yourself and thus blocking the manifestation of your true self.
:However, once you have repented, do not dwell on the same sin and bring suffering to your mind, which is a branch of God's mind. Sin disappears with repentance. Does not darkness vanish simultaneously with exposure to light? Those who do not repent, retain their sins. Is it not true that unexposed darkness remains darkness? Confession may be made in secret, or you may write a letter to a leader of the teachings. However, there is nothing to be gained by disclosing your sin in darkness or before people who will only ridicule you. What is the use of exposing darkness to darkness?
:When once man sincerely repents, from that very instant his original perfection as a child of God becomes manifested as if his whole being were cleansed and purified. After sincerely repenting, feel at peace within yourself because you are truly my children and I am one with all of you. Divine Spirit will flow abundantly through you, and your spirit will grow and finally attain Infinite Life.
:If any of you are ill, pray for each other. When you pray for each other, you receive my power. If you pray for only your own healing, you may be thinking only of your own benefits, but when you pray for each other, your feeling of love comes to the surface and you receive God's spiritual vibrations. For the sake of those who are ill, visit them and pray for them and also practice the Shinsokan. Know that both the mind that wants to hoard money and the mind that hungers for money cannot be in tune with the spiritual vibrations of God.
:Believers residing in the same district, unite and pray together! Families, gather and pray together! Although healing comes as a result of prayer, it is not your power, but God's power. Do not forget the source of power. Love each other, respect each other, serve each other and revere God. Since this world is a projected picture in which the vibrations of light and delusion intersect, the only way to save the world from suffering is to destroy delusion as soon as possible.
:(Message from the Spirit of the Lord on August 12, 1932)
===Holy Sutra: For Spiritual Healing=== ;Holy Sutra ;For Spiritual Healing
:One day the Angel returns to Seicho-No-Ie and sings: :Every one of you, walk the path of life without fear. :Misfortune will never approach you when you are fearless, :For misfortune and misery are not God's creations. :Walk the path of life fearlessly, and misfortune will shy away. :Disease will relinquish its power and revert to its original state of nothingness and disappear.
:Many years ago, :When the Zen monk, Takuan, calmly entered a tiger's cage and looked fearlessly into its eyes, :The tiger meekly lowered its head and became as tame as a kitten. :When you realize the Truth that man is a child of God and face the tiger without fear, it will become meek; :Face the bear boldly, and it will retreat. :In the same way, when you realize the Truth that man is a child of God and face disease without fear, it will vanish; :Face misfortune, and it will disappear. :Do not fear disease. :Do not fear misfortune.
:When your mind is fearless, :There will be neither ulcers nor inflammations. :When you dispel all delusions, :Misfortune and disease will vanish like a dream. :God never created tuberculosis, :Nor ulcers, :Neither colds, nor cancer, :Nor disease of any kind.
:All diseases are merely reflections of the deluded thoughts imagined by man. :Realize your true image that man is a child of God endowed with infinite power, :And banish delusion from your mind. :Thus, when delusion is banished and fear is completely gone, :All diseases will heal by themselves, :And a healthy body will appear.
:Inflammations and ulcers are only reflections of fear. :If you have no fear, though you may be injured, your wounds will neither become inflamed nor fester. :New tissue will regenerate at once, :And healthy cells will form anew.
:Laws of science based on "lifeless matter" are not the same as Laws of Life based on "living beings." :Lifeless matter, however combined in a test tube, can never produce a living being. :In order for nutrients to become transformed into a living body, :They must be placed under the control of Life. :When matter is placed under the control of Life, Matter, which changes only according to physical laws, Now recombines under a different law. :Although Life may accept and utilize the laws of matter, :Life, according to its desire, will freely control matter by transcending these laws.
:Even while employing the laws of matter, :Life is not subject to such laws. :That which transcends the laws of matter to form a body of its own choosing — that is Life. :Therefore, :As far as our living body is concerned, :The laws of matter are subordinate to the laws of Life. :For instance, when food :lacks vitamins, Life can create those vitamins. :When there are cavities in our lungs, Life can create new lung tissue. :When you were just an egg cell in your mother's womb, :You had neither lungs, nor heart, nor stomach. :But when Life dwells in the egg cell, :Which has no internal organs, :Out of nothingness Life creates all organs — including lungs, heart and stomach. :Disease is not a wild beast that can threaten you. :It is not a force that competes with Life for existence, :Nor can it intimidate Life. Disease, what are you?! :You are just another name for "nothingness." :You are a negative existence that appears only when Life is unaware of its own power and refuses to assert itself. :Darkness seems to exist :When light does not shine and assert itself, :In the same way, :"Disease" is nothing but "darkness" which appears like a ghostly shadow :When Life does not assert itself, :In Japanese, the words "disease" and "darkness" derive from the same root-word.
:Consider the case of the prisoner who was blindfolded and told: :'You are to be executed by having your neck artery severed." :When drops of warm water were trickled down his neck, :The condemned prisoner actually died of fear. :Imagine how many people have died simply out of fear. :The number of people who have died out of fear :Brought on by bleeding due to various illnesses :Is larger than the number killed in wars.
:Never fear the loss of blood. :Life is greater than blood. :As soon as bleeding begins, Life, with its natural healing power, :Starts mending the wound, Begins producing new blood, :And, before long, the body will double its supply of pure blood. :If man did not fear bleeding, he would not die of such fear.
:Do not be afraid of fever. :Fever is only a reflection of your angry, fearful, or irritable mind. :If you would stop being angry, :Stop being fearful, :Calm your irritable mind and become peaceful, :Then, a normal temperature will quietly return to you, :And the fever will disappear of its own accord.
:The secret to a calm and peaceful mind :Lies simply in being grateful and saying "Thank you" to everything. :When you are grateful to all people, things, circumstances and even your symptoms, :Naturally your mind will be blessed with peace.
:The wavelength of a peaceful mind :Is the same as God's healing vibration. :Where there is peace of mind, :God's healing vibration will come to dwell :And manifest itself as a healthy body. :I say to you, be at peace! :Know that health is already yours!
:The Angel continues to explain — :If your body were simply matter, :It could not fall ill even though exposed to chilly wintry air. :A stone is merely matter, :so it does not catch cold; A statue is simply matter, so it does not become sick with tuberculosis. :Stones and statues do not catch cold :Or become ill with tuberculosis because they are simply matter. :When man develops a runny nose or a cough by exposure to chilly air, It is altogether different from the physical law by which matter freezes and cracks when exposed to intense cold. :In the case of man, it is simply the law of the :"deluded mind" that causes illness. :No symptom can appear in matter by itself. :A symptom is merely a result of the fear generated by a "deluded mind."
:Throw away all fears, Praise and rejoice in the mystical healing power of Life! :If there is no "deluded mind," there can be neither sickness nor symptoms. :Disease is merely the expression of a "deluded mind." :No matter how many stones you may stuff into a laboratory specimen of a human stomach, :It would not develop a stomach-ache. :But if you were to stuff those stones into a living stomach, :Many individuals would probably develop severe indigestion. :Indigestion is an expression of fear caused by a "deluded mind."
:Rid yourself of your fearful mind. :That is when your disease will begin to heal. :If there is no delusion, there can be no inflammation of the internal organs, nor ulcers, nor tumors. :The destruction of inorganic matter when exposed to the violent effects of sulfuric acid, and the inflammation or ulceration that occurs in the physical body, are not the same. :Even though sulfuric acid may destroy the stomach lining, :An instant later healthy new tissue starts to form on the damaged surface, :And recovery continues— :At work here is the living body. :Medical science views only the effect, :And treats only to alleviate that effect. :The cause of disease is in the mind, :Moreover, it is in the "deluded mind." :Do not become captive to "delusion." :Discard "delusion" and contemplate the Truth that your life is God's life.
:Blood circulates freely according to your mind. ::Do not fear the fast pulse nor the slow pulse. :Even the emotion of shame ::Causes a rush of blood to the face; :A feeling of alarm ::Causes the heart to pound rapidly. :When the mind becomes peaceful, ::the heart will also become peaceful.
:The way to heal all disease is to first calm your emotions. :Disease caused by mental discord born of hatred ::Will be healed when love replaces hatred. :Disease caused by mental discord born of discontent ::Will be healed when gratitude replaces discontent. :Disease caused by mental hurt born of sorrow ::Will be healed when joy replaces sorrow.
:When you are always loving, grateful, ::And serve others with joy for the good of all, :No disease can harm you, ::And even those already afflicted with disease will recover quickly without fail.
:Since every disease is a reflection of thought, :If you stay in bed, hoping to be healed, :But worry about it, :Saying, "This disease... :this disease..." :Your disease will get worse instead of better. :Picture disease in your mind and disease comes. :To hope for healing while lying in a sickbed and constantly picturing disease in your mind, :Is like wishing to be cool :while holding fire in your hands.
:The sick, especially, must free their minds of disease. :Be only loving and grateful. :Love your country, :Love others, :Love your family. :Be grateful to all things, circumstances and people. :Be especially grateful to your parents. :Always be joyful as you perform services for others. :The feelings of love and gratitude :Are the best vibrations to tune in to the healing vibrations of Life.
:I say to you, rejoice that you are alive now. :Rejoice in the Nozu of your existence, :And your joy will heal your sickness. :If you were to receive a false telegram about your mother's death, :Your mind would grieve, believing the telegram to be true. :When your mind grieves, your body suffers :And your face pales. :But, when you receive a second telegram :Correcting the error of the first, :The sorrow in your mind vanishes, :You recover from the suffering of your physical body, :And your face regains its color and radiance.
:In this way, your physical sufferings :Are reflections of your mind. :Therefore, when you realize that your disease has no true existence, :Like the pale face of one who receives a telegram bearing false tidings, :Peace in your mind will be immediately restored, :And your physical symptoms will disappear.
:The Angel continues to preach — :Since God is good, :Since everything is an unfoldment of the One Mind of God, :Harmony is everywhere. :Discord may seem real, :But it does not truly exist. :Although discord does not truly exist, :If one keeps visualizing it, ::Discord will appear as a manifestation of the mind. :If one hears of an infectious disease and fears it, ::The disease will appear as a manifestation of those fears. :If one were told that a hairy caterpillar was crawling on his neck, ::His sensitive skin would develop a rash :Even though there was no caterpillar. :But if he were told that "there is no caterpillar," :The rash would disappear at once. :Generally, even inflammations of the internal organs :Are like rashes on the foolish man :Who imagined the caterpillar on his neck. :If one were told that germs are present, :Infection would occur even without germs. :But, if one were told that there are no germs, :Inflammation would immediately disappear, :Creating conditions unfavorable to the growth of germs. :Therefore never say, "You have an infection," :Even to those afflicted with disease germs. :When a patient is told, "You have no germs," :Through the power of these words he will have peace of mind. :A sense of relief will lead to a harmonious mind. :A harmonious mind will overcome the inflammation of the body, :And the disease germs will not be able to infect a body free of inflammation.
:Tell all the sick: :"You are spiritual beings and not physical bodies." :Germs cannot feed on spiritual beings; :God is spirit. :God cannot become ill. :Spirit cannot be controlled by the "laws of matter." :Becoming tired, worn out, sick or injured due to work :Are no more than the workings of the "laws of matter." :You, who are spirit, cannot be governed by the "laws of matter." :If, due to overwork, :Your energy is diminished, and you become tired and ill, :Such fatigue and illness are after all merely manifestations of your belief that :"Man is a bundle of material energy and becomes tired and ill when he works too hard." :When you change your beliefs, you will recover from your fatigue, :And the true image of health will manifest itself in your life.
:The essence of life is energy, not inertia. :When man works in accordance with the real nature of life, He will never become tired or ill. :The True Image of Life is that the more you work :The more you manifest the True Image of health. :Since man is spirit, He is governed only by the laws of spirit. :In the laws of spirit, There is no law of fatigue, :No law of disease, :But only the law of health. :So, no matter what symptoms may appear on your body, :Affirm that disease does not exist, :That disease is merely the manifestation of your beliefs. :No matter how real fatigue and disease may appear to the five senses, :They are never the True Image of human life. :Viewed in terms of the True Image of Life, :Disease is but a passing dream. :Those who wish to heal disease :Must know that man is a child of God and disease has no real existence.
:To heal disease means nothing more than to manifest the perfect man who is the child of God. :Every one of you, step out of your awareness of man is a child of God, and into the higher awareness of the child-of-God man. :For the child-of-God man, ::there is no disease. :The child-of-God man ::is governed only by God's laws. :Since God is Love, ::The "law of divine retribution" can never govern you.
:Since God is Life, :The "law of death" can never touch you. :Since God is Wisdom, Wisdom will find the proper place in the order permeating the entire universe, :For the child-of-God man, there can never be any discord. :When there is no discord, there can be no sickness. :You, the child-of-God man, :Do not fear the symptoms of disease. :Symptoms are materializations of a fearful mind. :When fear is destroyed, so too are the symptoms. :Do not say, "This sickness is a reflection of a certain delusion," and scrutinize each "delusion" in detail. :Since "delusion" is essentially nonexistent, :The "shadow of delusion" also does not exist. :Do not delve into the "nature" of sin, :Wondering, "What sin is causing this sickness?" :Because sin itself does not exist, :Neither do the "kinds" of sin. :Do not pursue that which does not exist.
:The True Image of your life :Is the Eternal God, :A diamond being, :An indestructible, :Perfect and consummate divine being. :Where, then, is delusion? :Where, then, is sin? :Where, then, is impurity?
:One who says, "I am being enlightened in so many different ways," :While being obsessed with various sins and delusions, :Indicates he is far from being enlightened. :It is as if he were groping in the dark, forgetting that there is light.
:Sin, delusion and disease are, after all, only a fleeting dream of "non-existent" things. :The law of "karma" is also just a passing dream. :The truly pure, immaculate being :Who has transcended karma and karmic suffering, :Is indeed the perfect and harmonious :True Image of your life.
:Do not vacillate over sin. :Do not vacillate over delusion, :Do not vacillate over disease. :Take a decisive leap upward! :Take a stroll through space! :The child-of-God man who strolls through space :Is indeed the True Image of your life. :There is no real you other than this True Image. :Though it appears as though the physical body exists, :It is only a shadow cast by the vibration of the mind.
:Real man is the child-of-God man. :Truly pure, harmonious child-of-God man, :Realize straightaway that you are the child-of-God man. :When you are aware that you are the child-of-God man, :And wipe away your dreams of sin, delusion and death, :Your fears will disappear, And your disease will also be destroyed.
:The Angel continues to preach — :The physical body is not you, :Do not worry about your body. :Anxiety brings fear, :And while there is fear, :physical discord will continue :As a manifestation of such fear. :Turn your mind around from your physical body to that which is higher. :Indeed, that which is higher is the real you. :If you cannot eradicate fear in spite of every effort with your mind, :Stop even trying to discard fears, :And just be as you are, Just be your True-Image self.
:No fear of any kind :Can exist in the True Image of Life. :Neither is it necessary to dispel nonexistent fear. :All you need to do is to be the expression of the True Image of your own life. :Even while you are in the grip of fear, there is really no fear. :When you rely completely on your real self, :God, the True Image, will wipe away all fears.
:Only God's law truly governs all things. :The "law of matter" cannot govern you, :The "law of sin" cannot govern you. :Neither can the "law of delusion" govern you.
:Thus, you are an indestructible True-Image being, :Physical things such as cold, heat, climate and bacteria cannot hurt you. :Stop thinking that you have been hurt by such physical things. :Stop thinking that you must suffer from this or that sin. :Stop thinking that this or that delusion is the cause of your illness. :Since disease, in essence, is nonexistent, :Its cause is also nonexistent. :When you realize that there is neither sickness, nor sin, nor delusion, nor death, :How can there be any fear at all?
:The Angel continues to teach — :Family strife, :Jealousy, :Hatred, :Revenge, :Anger — :All evil thoughts hinder recovery. :Should such evil thoughts arise, :Immediately recall the Truth that they do not exist in the child-of-God man, :And discard them.
:It is because of your belief that evil thoughts are real that :You have trouble discarding them. :Because evil thoughts originally do not exist in the True Image of Life, :They can be discarded.
:If you would always keep your mind filled with true love, peace, wisdom and harmony, :The perfect True Image of Life would appear in physical form as well. :Just as matter cannot of itself make any progress, :Neither can physical disease grow by itself. :When matter moves, :It does so by mind power or by a power designed by the mind. :Since the growth of physical disease is also due to mind power, :It is possible to stop its growth by mind power. :Furthermore, it is also possible to crush it and reduce its effect to nothingness. :No matter how serious a turn the disease may take, :Believe that the True Image of Life is always perfect, harmonious and healthy. :Always be calm, do not be perturbed. :Furthermore, do not be troubled :By constant changes in the condition of the disease.
:Since disease does not really exist, :Neither does the diseased condition. :Instead of always worrying about the disease, :Beware of your own mind. :What becomes agitated is not so much your disease, but your own mind.
:When the mind is agitated, :So is the disease. :It is not the disease itself which is agitated, :It is your mind. :Stop the agitation of your mind, :Then the agitation of your disease will also stop. :But, just as you cannot calm your agitation with an "agitated mind," a "worried mind" cannot stop worrying.
:In such cases, :Just entrust all to God. :Trust in God, the perfect Love, :And call to Him: "O God!" :God will always bless you with peace and harmony. :Give your mind to God. :Call repeatedly, "O God, O God!" :And trust yourself entirely to Him. :God, indeed, is all of everything. :Since God is all, :There is no existence other than God. :Since God is good, No evil can exist in the face of good. :Since God is perfect, Disease, which is imperfect, cannot exist. :Since God is Life, there can be no "death," which is contrary to Life. :"Evil," "disease" and "death" are only reflections of delusions that you have pictured in your mind. :When you conceive as real that which essentially does not exist and fear it— :That is your disease. :Suffering exists within your mind, :Pain exists within your mind. :When you expel fear from your mind, :You expel suffering, :You expel pain :Then, where is the disease?
:The Angel continues to teach — :Do not be alarmed should drastic changes occur in your body after hearing these Truths. :When a tall building comes crashing down, :It is accompanied by a thunderous roar. :The changes in your disease that resemble the thunderous crash, are the vibrations you feel when your tall stack of past delusions crumble and disappear. :The lower the stack of delusions, the smaller the crash. :The higher the stack, the more violent the crash. :Therefore do not fear these changes in your disease. :What crumbles is not you, but your "delusions." :"Delusions" crumble, but the real you will never crumble. :"Delusions" suffer, but the real you will never suffer.
:You are a child of God, child of the Buddha, :A diamond being, an inviolate being, :Diseaseless being, ever-joyous being. :Never fall prey to sensualism and rationalism, :And thus lose sight of your ever-happy, inviolate, diamond self. :Now, all the sick are healed And rise from their sickbeds!
:When the Angel makes this revelation, :Behold, every disease and infirmity of mankind disappears instantly! :The blind open their eyes, the lame stand up! :They rejoice, embrace each other :And dance joyfully as they look up to the sun in heaven! :This is not a dream, it is real! :Cherubs look up in praise, :Then bow, and sing, saying— :"God is all of everything, :God is our Father, Light and Salvation!" :Then, the sun, which is the heavenly temple of God, :Shines out brilliantly as if dancing in the sky, :The light of God comes cascading down to earth like a shower of shimmering flower petals. :A brilliant rainbow appears in the sky to become an arch beneath the clouds, :And there appears in full splendor the glory of the True-Image world.
:(End of the Holy Sutra)
===Affirmation=== ;Affirmation
:Through the merits of this Holy Sutra, :may all delusions of mankind vanish, :diseases vanish, :and sufferings vanish, :and may Heaven, the Pure Land, :be established upon this earth.
===Meditation to Regain Health=== ;Meditation to Regain Health
:God has forgiven me, :and with his infinite love, :He embraces me and enfolds me. :I am already healed!
:(Repeat this meditation for ten minutes or so after reading the Sutra or as needed by the sick.)
===Translation note=== :The translation staff of Holy Sutras Prayerful Song to Praise and Bless the Holy Missioners, Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines, Song of the Angel: :Dean T. Makinodan, Chief Translator :Paul I. Kikumoto :Leslie Y. Iwatani :The translation of Holy Sutra for Spiritual Healing: :SEICHO-NO-IE, INC
==Song of Reality== ;SONG OF REALITY
;<1> :God is all of everything, every being. :God is the Almighty Perfect Life. :God is the All-knowing Perfect Wisdom. :God is the All-loving Perfect Love.
:Within everyone and in everything :Almighty God's Perfect Life resides. :All-knowing God's Perfect Wisdom exists. :All-loving God's Perfect Love prevails.
:God is All, the Absolute, Supreme One. :All is of one body, one existence. :He is back of all things and every being. :One Power, Absolute, gives life to all.
:The Creator of Heaven and Earth is one. :One God's Life Power permeates all life. :Heaven and Earth in Truth are only one, :Filled with God's harmony and wondrous light.
:I exist in this wondrous World of Truth. :I am a child of God, child of Light, the Almighty. :Perfect peace and grand harmony shall reign. :Radiant world of omnipresent light!
;<2> :God is Life, Perfect, whole, and immaculate. ::I'm a child of God, His spirit within me. :I let live and give life, strength, and hope to all, ::As all things give me life and uplift me.
:God is Love, perfect, pure, and all-embracing. ::I'm a child of God, His spirit within me. :I love all through and through, seeking to return. ::All things also love me and nourish me.
:God is Wisdom, unerring and knowing all. ::I'm a child of God, His spirit within me. :I know all things, for we all are of one mind. ::All things know me and guide to comfort me.
:God is all of everything , everywhere. ::I'm a child of God, His spirit within me. :When in Oneness I pray, Heaven and Earth respond. ::When in Oneness I move, the Universe moves.
:I exist in this wondrous World of Truth. ::I am a child of God, child of light, the Almighty. :Perfect peace and grand harmony shall reign. ::Radiant world of omnipresent light!
